mapper.sql: select id, software_code, software_name, project_code, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, money, cost_type, status from t_software
mapper.insert: insert into t_software ( software_code, software_name, project_code, description, create_by, create_time, money, cost_type, status, delete_flag ) values ( #{softwareCode}, #{softwareName}, #{projectCode}, #{description}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{money}, #{costType}, 1, '0' )
